pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-009 (Security & Privacy/Knowledge) scores 0.438 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.438). Scope is edge_case for Clinical AI Specialist: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Security & Privacy, composite 0.438. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Security & Privacy for Clinical AI Specialist at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Security & Privacy appears in ~45% of Clinical AI Specialist postings as a secondary competency. HIPAA/PHI security competencies present as secondary requirement in regulated health AI. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Security & Privacy without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Security & Privacy without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
